economic_notes: Operates on-reserve Gas Bar and Convenience Store, Tim Hortons kiosk (licensed franchise), and has ownership interests in Shwe Miikaan Corp and Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 noted as potential future impact.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Consolidated entity includes Magnetawan Development GP Inc. and Magnetawan Development Limited Partnership. Two equity-method investments: Shwe Miikaan Corp (33.333%) and Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (33.333%). Significant drop in revenue from 2019 ($26M) to 2020 ($14M) largely due to contract revenue falling from $10.6M to $596K and sales declining from $10.3M to $8.5M. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,784,688 + Health Canada $17,127 + CMHC $120,133 + Ministry of Children/Community/Social Services $259,600 + Ministry of Indigenous Affairs $85,000 + Ministry of Health $142,656 = $2,409,204. OSR includes rental, interest, sales, other, contract revenue, OFNLP distribution, and share of business enterprise loss.
